requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters in Dominica Utility Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——多米尼克公用事业项目中光伏逆变器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——多米尼克公用事業項目中光伏逆變器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Dominica's standards environment is influenced by UK / IEC legacy practice and by Eastern Caribbean / CARICOM regional procurement norms. For grid-tied solar PV inverters, EMC evidence should be prepared around IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series emissions and immunity tests, including harmonic current and voltage fluctuation considerations where required by DOMLEC or the project owner. Because tourism, public buildings, resorts, and island distribution feeders can be sensitive to power-quality issues, project submissions should clearly identify inverter model, firmware, power rating, conducted and radiated emissions evidence, harmonic limits, and any site-specific filtering or export-control configuration.
summary.zh: 多米尼克标准环境受英国 / IEC传统实践以及东加勒比 / CARICOM区域采购惯例影响。对于并网太阳能光伏逆变器，EMC证据应围绕适用于光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列发射和抗扰度测试准备，包括DOMLEC或项目业主要求时的谐波电流和电压波动考虑。由于旅游设施、公共建筑、度假村和岛屿配电馈线可能对电能质量敏感，项目提交文件应明确逆变器型号、固件、功率等级、传导和辐射发射证据、谐波限值以及任何现场特定滤波或防逆流配置。
summary.zht: 多米尼克標準環境受英國 / IEC傳統實務以及東加勒比 / CARICOM區域採購慣例影響。對於併網太陽能光伏逆變器，EMC證據應圍繞適用於光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列發射和抗擾度測試準備，包括DOMLEC或項目業主要求時的諧波電流和電壓波動考慮。由於旅遊設施、公共建築、度假村和島嶼配電饋線可能對電能品質敏感，項目提交文件應明確逆變器型號、韌體、功率等級、傳導和輻射發射證據、諧波限值以及任何現場特定濾波或防逆流配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions, immunity, harmonics, and voltage fluctuation standards as applicable
DBOS standards-adoption context — confirm applicable IEC or regional standards with Dominica Bureau of Standards
DOMLEC project power-quality and interconnection conditions — confirm project-specific harmonic and EMC requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related China domestic EMC tests performed by CNAS-accredited laboratories. The test methods may overlap conceptually with IEC 61000-series methods, but China-only GB/T reports do not automatically satisfy IEC 62920 or the exact IEC 61000 evidence expected by DBOS, DOMLEC, lenders, resorts, or public-sector project owners in Dominica. Reports prepared at China 220/380 V settings should also be reviewed for relevance to Dominica 230/400 V operation.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关中国国内EMC测试，并由CNAS认可实验室出具。测试方法可能在概念上与IEC 61000系列方法重叠，但仅中国GB/T报告不会自动满足DBOS、DOMLEC、贷款方、度假村或多米尼克公共部门项目业主所期望的IEC 62920或具体IEC 61000证据。在中国220/380 V设置下编制的报告还应审查其对多米尼克230/400 V运行的适用性。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關中國國內EMC測試，並由CNAS認可實驗室出具。測試方法可能在概念上與IEC 61000系列方法重疊，但僅中國GB/T報告不會自動滿足DBOS、DOMLEC、貸款方、度假村或多米尼克公共部門項目業主所期望的IEC 62920或具體IEC 61000證據。在中國220/380 V設置下編制的報告還應審查其對多米尼克230/400 V運行的適用性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes China domestic EMC requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T EMC reports are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence in Dominica. Exporters should provide IEC 62920 EMC type-test evidence for the exact inverter model, applicable IEC 61000 harmonic and immunity reports, and an engineering note confirming whether the reports cover the 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration supplied to Dominica. Where coastal installations use long AC cable runs, filters, export-limiting devices, or communications equipment, include the final configuration in the EMC file.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T EMC报告不能自动替代多米尼克项目中的IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据。出口商应为具体逆变器型号提供IEC 62920 EMC型式试验证据、适用IEC 61000谐波和抗扰度报告，以及确认报告是否覆盖供应至多米尼克的230/400 V、50 Hz配置的工程说明。若沿海安装使用较长交流电缆、滤波器、防逆流装置或通信设备，应将最终配置纳入EMC文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T EMC報告不能自動替代多米尼克項目中的IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據。出口商應為具體逆變器型號提供IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗證據、適用IEC 61000諧波和抗擾度報告，以及確認報告是否覆蓋供應至多米尼克的230/400 V、50 Hz配置的工程說明。若沿海安裝使用較長交流電纜、濾波器、防逆流裝置或通信設備，應將最終配置納入EMC文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for DOMLEC grid review, DBOS or owner standards compliance, and lender or public-sector procurement where IEC evidence is specified
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T EMC evidence is domestic conformity evidence and does not automatically transfer to Dominica IEC-referenced project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China-only GB/T EMC evidence as the sole EMC file for Dominica. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the specific model and confirm that they cover the Dominica 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration. Verify current DBOS, DOMLEC, and project-owner EMC expectations before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅中国GB/T EMC证据作为多米尼克唯一EMC文件。应为具体型号准备IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000报告，并确认其覆盖多米尼克230/400 V、50 Hz配置。出货前请核实现行DBOS、DOMLEC及项目业主EMC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅中國GB/T EMC證據作為多米尼克唯一EMC文件。應為具體型號準備IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000報告，並確認其覆蓋多米尼克230/400 V、50 Hz配置。出貨前請核實現行DBOS、DOMLEC及項目業主EMC要求。
